'''Gavens''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]]-inhabited [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Gavens system/Legends|Gavens system]]. It was the birthplace of [[Akanah Norand Goss Pell]]. Its [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] was [[Torlas]].

{{Planet-stub}}
